description: Appends a structured decision-log entry. Every agent conclusion is recorded here with its evidence_event_ids (the world-events that justify it), so the UI can link every conclusion back to live evidence. Idempotent on decision_id. Input: doc_json — a JSON string of the full decision object (keys: decision_id, run_id, ts, agent, kind, summary, evidence_event_ids[], and optionally detail, simulated, related{}). A server-side ingest pipeline parses it into a typed document.
